overview.value: Snake Plant has upright sword-like leaves and stores water in thick foliage. It is highly drought tolerant and works well in bedrooms, offices, and low-maintenance spaces.

careDifficultyDescription.value: Needs little attention and prefers being slightly neglected.

light.value: Low to bright indirect light; avoid sudden intense direct sun.

water.value: Let soil dry completely before watering, often every 2-4 weeks.

diseaseRiskDescription.value: Soft leaf bases usually mean overwatering or cold damage.

fertilizer.value: Feed once or twice in spring and summer with diluted fertilizer.

tips.value: Use a pot with drainage and avoid watering into the center of the rosette.
